overview: Sheepshead is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): -70 HP, 0 physical damage, 250 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
